message:
So, the other day, I was in the kitchen whipping up a little dinner magic when I realized I had a full-on smoke alarm drill going on. I mean, I always think I’m a bit of an over-preparer, but this was next level! I had the smoke alarm running a test, the fire extinguisher on the counter (just in case), and an escape plan mapped out in my head. My family walked in and just laughed, calling me the ‘fire safety queen.’

But honestly, it felt good knowing I had all my bases covered. It’s a nice reminder that being a little extra prepared can make a big difference in keeping our home safe. I even stumbled on this little refresher that helped me fine-tune my escape plan. 

How do you keep your kitchen safe from surprise smoke alarms?
